violations.text: (Windex) was stored on the same shelf as single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food deli sandwich with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Pulled pork obtained from a commercially processed package was observed being reheated in a crock pot to an internal temperature of 64°F. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. PIC reheated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Spaghetti which was prepared on site, date marked 9/18 was observed held beyond the 7 days. Food items exceeding the 7 days shall be discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

(Chemical) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Knives were stored on an unclean surface (in between prep units) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Freezer (1dr) door gaskets were observed in torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (vents, knife rack, shelving) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The wall junctures in the pizza area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The wall in the ware washing area has an accumulation of black residue and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025
The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Food was observed held at 43-46 degrees Fahrenheit in the small prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the small prep unit since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Prep unit must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Food was observed expired in the walk-in cooler and prep unit. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
